queries.question: What is John Doe's GPA and courses?
queries.sql: SELECT Grades.CourseName, Grades.Gpa FROM Grades JOIN Enrollments ON Enrollments.EnrollmentID = Grades.EnrollmentID JOIN Students ON Students.StudentID = Enrollments. StudentID WHERE Students.fullname = 'John Doe';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?coursename ?gpa WHERE {
  ?grades a :Grades .
  ?enrollments a :Enrollments .
  ?grades p:hasEnrollments ?enrollments .
  ?students a :Students .
  ?enrollments p:hasStudents ?students .
  ?grades p:CourseName ?coursename .
  ?grades p:Gpa ?gpa .
  ?students p:name ?fullname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?fullname_f) = "John Doe")
}

queries.question: Who got the lowest standardized test score and what was the score?
queries.sql: SELECT Grades.Standardized_Test_Score, Students.fullname FROM Students JOIN Enrollments ON Students.StudentID = Enrollments. StudentID  JOIN Grades ON Enrollments.EnrollmentID = Grades.EnrollmentID ORDER BY Grades.Standardized_Test_Score ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?standardized_test_score ?fullname WHERE {
  ?students a :Students .
  ?enrollments a :Enrollments .
  ?enrollments p:hasStudents ?students .
  ?grades a :Grades .
  ?grades p:hasEnrollments ?enrollments .
  ?grades p:Standardized_Test_Score ?standardized_test_score .
  ?students p:name ?fullname .
  ?grades p:Standardized_Test_Score ?standardized_test_score_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?standardized_test_score_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Who got the lowest score and what was the score?
queries.sql: SELECT Grades.Gpa, Students.fullname FROM Students JOIN Enrollments ON Students.StudentID = Enrollments. StudentID  JOIN Grades ON Enrollments.EnrollmentID = Grades.EnrollmentID ORDER BY Grades.Gpa ASC LIMIT 1

queries.question: Who got the lowest score and what was the score?
queries.sql: SELECT Grades.Gpa, Grades.Standardized_Test_Score,  Students.fullname FROM Students JOIN Enrollments ON Students.StudentID = Enrollments. StudentID  JOIN Grades ON Enrollments.EnrollmentID = Grades.EnrollmentID ORDER BY Grades.Gpa, Grades.Standardized_Test_Score ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?gpa ?standardized_test_score ?fullname WHERE {
  ?students a :Students .
  ?enrollments a :Enrollments .
  ?enrollments p:hasStudents ?students .
  ?grades a :Grades .
  ?grades p:hasEnrollments ?enrollments .
  ?grades p:Gpa ?gpa .
  ?grades p:Standardized_Test_Score ?standardized_test_score .
  ?students p:name ?fullname .
  ?grades p:Gpa ?gpa_o .
  ?grades p:Standardized_Test_Score ?standardized_test_score_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?gpa_o) ASC(?standardized_test_score_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Tell me the results of John Doe's standardized test, his GPA and the courses he is taking.
queries.sql: SELECT Grades.CourseName,  Grades.Gpa , Grades.Standardized_Test_Score FROM Grades JOIN Enrollments ON Enrollments.EnrollmentID = Grades.EnrollmentID JOIN Students ON Students.StudentID = Enrollments. StudentID WHERE Students.fullname = 'John Doe';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?coursename ?gpa ?standardized_test_score WHERE {
  ?grades a :Grades .
  ?enrollments a :Enrollments .
  ?grades p:hasEnrollments ?enrollments .
  ?students a :Students .
  ?enrollments p:hasStudents ?students .
  ?grades p:CourseName ?coursename .
  ?grades p:Gpa ?gpa .
  ?grades p:Standardized_Test_Score ?standardized_test_score .
  ?students p:name ?fullname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?fullname_f) = "John Doe")
}

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>

CHOICE vague {

  ?grades a :Grades .
  ?enrollments a :Enrollments .
  ?grades p:hasEnrollments ?enrollments .
  ?students a :Students .
  ?enrollments p:hasStudents ?students .

  ?grades p:Gpa ?gpa .

} }

  ?grades a :Grades .
  ?enrollments a :Enrollments .
  ?grades p:hasEnrollments ?enrollments .
  ?students a :Students .
  ?enrollments p:hasStudents ?students .
  ?grades p:CourseName ?coursename .
  ?grades p:Gpa ?gpa .
  ?grades p:Standardized_Test_Score ?standardized_test_score .
  ?students p:name ?fullname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?fullname_f) = "John Doe")
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?coursename ?standardized_test_score WHERE {
  ?grades a :Grades .
  ?enrollments a :Enrollments .
  ?grades p:hasEnrollments ?enrollments .
  ?students a :Students .
  ?enrollments p:hasStudents ?students .
  ?grades p:CourseName ?coursename .
  ?grades p:Standardized_Test_Score ?standardized_test_score .
  ?students p:name ?fullname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?fullname_f) = "John Doe")
} }
}
